title: Majalesovo Rank Icons
description: Have you been looking for some cool designs for your Ranks in chat or in TabList? Now you found one for FREE!! Take the advantage and download now!
body:
![Introduction image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12e15b0e170064dbbbe456730b494c9c1f1075c7.png)
---
## Are you tired of seeing every Rank Icons for crazy amount of money?! 

Let me present to you **Majalesovo Icon Pack**, Free Resource Pack including over **55+ Rank**
**Icons** for your server. This pack is built for starter server owners who don't want to spend
a lot of money inside their Minecraft Server!

## FAQ

- ####  Does this pack support Oraxen or ItemsAdder?
     Yes, this pack is built with **3 types of ResourcePack Engines**. First one is **Oraxen**, Second one is **ItemsAdder** and for someone who doesn't own any of these there is Classic **Minecraft ResourcePack build** included.

- #### What is inside the ZIP File? 💸
     Inside this ZIP File, you will receive **4 Folders**. (Minecraft ResourcePack, Oraxen, ItemsAdder and PSD Files Folder)

- #### Best Addons for this ResourcePack? ⭐
1.
     [TAB](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/tab-1-5-1-21-1.57806/) - Best plugin for custom TAB Designs. **(Required)**
2. 
     [LuckPerms](https://luckperms.net/download) - Best plugin for managing the roles inside tablist and chat. **(Required)**
3. 
     [ForcePack](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/forcepack.45439/) - Best plugin to force player to accept your ResourcePack. **(Optional)**
